MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff William Tom, is present. Represented by
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Alexandra Livsey, is present.
Attorney, Jeremy Reyes, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-29-2010 is vacated.
